stories.headline: Iran’s gunboat fires on container ship off Oman coast
stories.description: The IRGC says the aggression came in response to what it described as the US seizure of an Iranian commercial vessel.

stories.headline: Virginia redistricting election results: Key takeaways from Democrats’ win
stories.description: This vote is part of a wider national fight between Democrats and Republicans over gerrymandering.

stories.headline: Russia strikes Ukraine’s Odesa port, kills railway worker in Zaporizhia
stories.description: Strikes on civilian infrastructure are proof of terrorism, Ukraine says.

stories.headline: Gaza’s unseen casualties: A surge in stillbirths and birth defects
stories.description: Gaza sees a 140% rise in stillbirths and a doubling of congenital anomalies as the devastating impacts of war linger.

stories.headline: UK inflation rises after Iran war pushes up fuel prices
stories.description: The figures provide the first official look at the impact of the Iran war on the cost of living in the UK.
